name: Poppy Seed Tea Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
1. Grease a tube pan and lightly dust with flour.
2. Cream the butter, sugar, egg yolks, and poppy seeds together.
3. Sift together the cake flour and baking soda.
4. Alternately add the flour mixture and sour cream to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Combine gently until just combined.
5. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites, almond extract, and cinnamon into the batter.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared tube pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Cool on a rack. Serves 8-10.
